description: Teamwork.com is a SaaS platform for project management, resource planning, and profitability tracking for client-service teams. It also includes related products such as Teamwork Desk for support ticketing and Teamwork Spaces for knowledge-base/documentation management.
summary: Teamwork.com exposes three tenant-hosted HTTP APIs for Teamwork.com, Desk, and Spaces; all require authentication and support Teamwork user API keys and Teamwork OAuth app bearer tokens.
